name: video-bug-analyzer
description: Analyze a screen recording with Claude: extract frames (contact sheet, scene cuts, per-timestamp zoom + before/after strips) and reason over them to diagnose UI/rendering bugs, plus analysis modes — black-screen detection, ROI OCR, feature measurement, palette, cross-clip diff/compare, cadence, motion & saturation timelines. Requires ffmpeg (auto-installs where the sandbox allows). Canonical source: cportka/claude-plugins (portka-tools marketplace).
